heading: Official stations
label: 584 Official stations
text: The Attorney General may determine the official stations of the United States trustees and assistant United States trustees within the regions for which they were appointed.
notes: Codification, as amended, which provided for the repeal of this section and the deletion of any references to United States Trustees in this title at a prospective date, was repealed by . See note set out preceding .Section 408(c) of Pub. L. 95–598section 307(b) of Pub. L. 99–554section 581 of this title
